title: oncidium polycladium
intro: Oncidium polycladium, a species of orchid, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America. Traditionally, Oncidium polycladium has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and acting as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Oncidium polycladium is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
